title: A Song of Degrees. See now! what is so good, or what so pleasant, as for brethren to dwell together?

verses.t: It is as ointment on the head, that ran down to the beard, even the beard of Aaron; that ran down to the fringe of his clothing.
As the dew of Aermon, that comes down on the mountains of Sion: for there the Lord commanded the blessing, even life for ever. *132:1 Alex. + 'for David.' Public Domain
